creator: kristinacors
caption: When I realized Paris is organized like a snail 🐌 it changed EVERYTHING about planning my trip 😳 Watch till the end and tell me…Did you know this?! #travelbucketlist #parisitinerary #parisfashionweek #parishiddengems #parisarrondissements

transcription.text: Okay, when I learned this, planning a trip to Paris got so much easier. This blew my mind, but Paris neighborhoods, also known as arrondissements, don't cover me for my French accent because I know it's horrible. Anyway, the Paris neighborhoods, we'll call them ARRs to make it easier for me to say, are organized like a snail. So the first ARR is in the center, then you have the second, then you have the third, then you have the fourth, and it moves in a spiral like this, in a clockwise direction. Learning this actually blew my mind, you guys have no idea, as somebody who comes from New York City, I'm just used to the grid, and I just couldn't make sense of Paris. And now it makes total sense. By the way, I just created a new Paris itinerary, so if you're someone who likes aesthetic bars, cafes, restaurants, hidden gems, unique things to do, then definitely click on the link in my bio and check that out. Hope this helps you guys out, and follow for more.
